data.title: Wireless Mouses
data.statement:
You run a company that verifies whether wireless mouse receivers are still working.

Each receiver only listens to a specific frequency determined by the serial number of the mouse it was originally paired with. You have a programmable test mouse that can transmit on any frequency.

Given a mouse serial number, compute the frequency your test mouse must use.

The frequency is derived from the serial number using the following rules:

Each character is converted to a numeric value:
Characters 0–9 → values 0–9
Characters A–Z → values 10–35

Initialize an accumulator:

[[acc]] = <<0>>
Process the serial from left to right. For each character with value v:

If the character is a vowel (<<E>>, <<A>>, <<I>>, <<U>>, <<O>>):

[[acc]]  = [[acc]]  XOR [[v]]

Otherwise:

[[acc]] = [[acc]] * {{31}} + [[v]]) mod {{1000}}
The final frequency is acc, formatted as a 3-digit number with leading zeroes if necessary.
data.inputDescription: <<Line 1:>> A string [[S]] for the serial number of the receiver

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You run a company that verifies whether wireless mouse receivers are still working.

Each receiver only listens to a specific frequency determined by the serial number of the mouse it was originally paired with. You have a programmable test mouse that can transmit on any frequency.

Given a mouse serial number, compute the frequency your test mouse must use.

The frequency is derived from the serial number using the following rules:

Each character is converted to a numeric value:
Characters 0–9 → values 0–9
Characters A–Z → values 10–35

Initialize an accumulator:

acc = 0
Process the serial from left to right. For each character with value v:

If the character is a vowel (E, A, I, U, O):

acc = acc XOR v

Otherwise:

acc = acc * 31 + v) mod 1000
The final frequency is acc, formatted as a 3-digit number with leading zeroes if necessary.
Input
Line 1: A string S for the serial number of the receiver
Output
Line 1: The frequency for your test mouse
Constraints
lenght of frequency = 3
1 ≤ lenght of S ≤ 100
Example
Input
A
Output
010
